prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第54名，近年排名在48–55名区间波动，整体处于中上211水平；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（不明巨型生物活动致停课），可能轻微影响考生报考信心；抖音热度排名第98（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，未形成明显热度助推；材料科学与工程A、机械工程A-、交通运输工程A-，三大主干学科均为A类，与该校招生专业高度匹配，对相关方向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核心工科专业社会热度高热推荐，材料类（生化环材）明显劝退，机械/智能制造分化观望；本省2026年考生总数377900人，按近年物理类占比约60%估算约226740人，较2025年物理类173282人增加约53458人（增幅约30.8%），竞争显著加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批430分，较2024年理科一批505分大幅下降，反映试卷难度或考生结构变化；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，在云南招生计划稳定（86人），无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8388名、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生大幅增加约30.8%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约8558名，区间8058–9058名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 7042 → 7211 → 6942 → 6316 → 8388 respectively. In 2025, due to the change in exam mode from "Science" to "Physics Category" and the merger of major groups, the ranking significantly shifted backward, expanding by about 2072 places compared to 2024. Over the past five years, the overall trend has been fluctuating upward, with a baseline of about 8388 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category was stable at 75–76 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 86 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 86 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, thus no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 54th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48–55, overall at an upper-middle 211 level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (suspension of classes due to unidentified giant biological activity), which may slightly affect candidates' confidence in applying. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with low short video exposure, not forming significant popularity boost. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Transportation Engineering (A-) are all A-class disciplines, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, providing stable attraction for candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended. Materials (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials) are clearly discouraged, while Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing are divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of provincial candidates is 377,900, with an estimated 226,740 in the Physics Category (about 60% of total), an increase of about 53,458 (approximately 30.8%) compared to 173,282 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 430 points, a sharp drop from the 2024 Science first batch of 505 points, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or candidate structure. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with a stable enrollment plan in Yunnan (86 students), with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8388, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 30.8% in provincial Physics Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8558, with a range of 8058–9058.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Automation (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Communication Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical (Intelligent Manufacturing) (Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Industrial Engineering)
- Mechanical (Vehicle) (Vehicle Engineering, Automotive Service Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering)
- Materials (Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, etc.)
- Energy and Power Engineering (New Energy Power).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (including Biology) (Biotechnology, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Business Administration (Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Accounting, Entrepreneurship Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8058–9058, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 8058), focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Electronic Information. For rankings near the upper limit (around 9058), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 2288→2148→2083→2056→3165 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a slow forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In 2025, due to the change of exam category to 'History Category' and the merger of major groups, the ranking significantly dropped by about 1109 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3165. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was stable at 13 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 14 in 2024, and to 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 21, an increase of 6 (40%) compared to 2025, significantly expanding enrollment scale and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 54th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48–55, overall at an upper-middle 211 level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may slightly affect candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), without significant popularity boost. Materials Science and Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Transportation Engineering A-, all engineering directions, have no direct disciplinary evaluation correlation with liberal arts enrollment majors (Business Administration, Law, Foreign Languages and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.). Liberal arts majors have no A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law category is socially hot (recommended), Business Administration category is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages and Literature category is generally wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication category is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 377,900, estimated at about 151,160 based on the recent history category proportion of about 40%, an increase of about 38,754 (about 34.5%) compared to 112,406 in 2025. The 40% enrollment expansion is slightly larger than the 34.5% candidate increase, slightly easing competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 465 points, a significant drop from the 2024 liberal arts first batch of 550 points. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region. Its liberal arts enrollment scale in Yunnan is small but significantly expanded in 2026, reflecting increased attention to Yunnan liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3165, the significant 40% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition), the increase of about 34.5% in provincial history category candidates (intensifying competition), the slightly larger expansion rate than candidate growth, and the somewhat negative school reputation, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3865, with a range of 3365–4365.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law Category (Law, Intellectual Property, Social Work (Digital Social Governance))
- Economics Category (Economics, Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration Category (Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Accounting, Entrepreneurship Management)
- Network and New Media.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature Category (English, French)
- Ideological and Political Education.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3365–4365, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3365), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Law and Economics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4365), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
